generated_from.method: roster assembled from the official EPHS clubs/activities pages (indexed content) and authoritative public sources; refreshable via scripts/clubs-refresh.mjs
generated_from.note: Official EPHS clubs page is a dynamic SPA blocked by this environment's network policy. Roster assembled from the official site's indexed content plus authoritative sources (Wikipedia, EP Activities). School-specific logistics (advisor, room, exact time) are 'Not listed' where not officially available. Most student-interest clubs meet during EP Focus/Flex time on Tuesdays (officially stated). active/category are best-effort and admin-editable.
